title: Submitting a Grievance, Complaint, or HR Concern
text:
Q: How do I submit a grievance, complaint, or HR concern?
A: To submit a grievance, complaint, or HR concern, please follow these steps: First, document your concern in writing, including specific details such as dates, times, and individuals involved. Next, submit your written concern to your immediate supervisor or the HR department within 10 business days of the incident. If the issue involves your supervisor, you may bypass them and go directly to HR. HR will acknowledge receipt of your complaint within 3 business days. An investigation will typically be conducted within 15 business days, and you will be informed of the outcome. If you are not satisfied with the resolution, you may appeal the decision by submitting a written appeal to HR within 5 business days of receiving the outcome. For any questions or assistance, please contact the HR department at hr@company.com or call extension 1234.
